title: Camps * Adoption/Foster Care/Kinship Care Issues - 211info
text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Youth Services > Camps * Adoption/Foster Care/Kinship Care Issues 1 Matching Service Providers The mapped locations are estimates, for the exact location of an individual site, select "More Details" Refine Results - Select - No Filter Adoption/Foster Care/Kinship Care Issues African American Community AIDS/HIV Autism Spectrum Disorder Disabilities Issues Families/Friends of People With Cancer Former Foster Children Foster Children Muscular Dystrophy Native American Community Accessibility Options - Select - No Filter Wheelchair Access (Full) Wheelchair Access (Partial) Accessible Parking (Private Lot) Accessible Parking (Nearby Public/Street Parking) Accessible Restrooms Alternative Communication Formats Virtual Service Options Staff Trained in Disability Awareness Print & Share All Results X Print & Share Print PDF KINDRED MATTERS SIBLING CAMP Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF A week-long residential camp providing separated siblings the opportunity to build positive memories through activities like campfires, swimming, and shared celebrations Confidential Address Eligibility: Separated siblings aged 8–18 living apart due to foster care, adoption, or other circumstances Hours: Varies (458) 888-9356 Visit Website More Details KINDRED MATTERS FAMILY CAMP Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Resource families attend expert-led workshops and community activities while volunteers provide childcare Confidential Address Eligibility: Resource Parents Hours: Varies Email (458) 888-9356 Visit Website More Details No Mapping Information Available
